title: adenostoma fasciculatum var. obtusifolium
intro: Adenostoma fasciculatum var. obtusifolium, also known as the Mountain Mahogany or Bigberry, is a shrub-like plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a variety of the Adenostoma fasciculatum plant, which is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Adenostoma fasciculatum var. obtusifolium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or orally to reap its health benefits.
